{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Hungry Deep
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is the [[Monarch of the Hungry Deep]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
